A

addBooking(String, String, String, HashSet<String>, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Creates a new booking, persists it to the bookings and booking_seats tables in a single transaction, and adds it to the in-memory map.
addBookingRow(Booking) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUIController
Appends a confirmed Booking to the booking history table.
addMovie(String, String, int, String, String, String, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Creates a new Movie, inserts it into the movies table, and adds it to the in-memory map.
addMovieRow(Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUIController
Adds a newly created Movie to the live table.
addMovieRow(Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUIController
Adds a Movie back to the movie table after a booking is cancelled.

B

Booking - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model
Represents a single movie ticket booking placed by a registered user.
Booking(String, String, String, LocalDateTime, HashSet<String>, int, boolean) - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Constructs a new Booking with all required fields.
BookingRepository - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories
Static in-memory repository that holds all Booking records for the currently logged-in user.
BookingRepository() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
 

C

calculateTotalPrice(HashSet<String>, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
 
cancelBooking(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Cancels the booking with the given ID: Deletes all booking_seats rows for this booking. Deletes the bookings header row. Removes the cancelled seats from the in-memory Movie.getOccupiedSeat() set so the seat map reflects availability immediately without a full reload. Removes the Booking from the in-memory map. Both DELETE statements run inside a single transaction so the database stays consistent if either fails.

D

DatabaseService - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.database
Singleton service responsible for two concerns: Lifecycle — starts and stops the embedded MariaDB server via MariaDB4j.
DatabaseService() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.database.DatabaseService
 
deleteMovie(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Removes the movie with the given ID from both the movies table and the in-memory map.
displayConfirmationDialog(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal Yes/No confirmation dialog with the given message and title, and returns whether the user selected Yes.
displayError(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal error dialog with the given message and an Alert.AlertType.ERROR icon.
displayInformation(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal information dialog with the given message and an Alert.AlertType.INFORMATION icon.
DisplayMessage - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util
Utility class that centralizes all user-facing dialog box interactions in the Ketchup application.
displayWarning(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal warning dialog with the given message and a Alert.AlertType.WARNING icon.

E

editMovie(String, Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Replaces the movie record in both the movies table and the in-memory map with the supplied edited Movie.
export(String, File) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.services.TicketPdfExportService
Generates a PDF ticket for the specified booking and writes it to outputFile.

G

getBookingEmail() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the email address of the user who made this booking.
getBookingId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the unique identifier of this booking.
getBookings() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Returns the entire in-memory booking map for the current session.
getChosenSeats() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the set of seat IDs selected by the user for this booking.
getConnection() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.database.DatabaseService
Opens and returns a new JDBC Connection to the embedded ketchup database.
getCredentials() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Returns the entire in-memory credential map.
getDatetimeFormat() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the shared DateTimeFormatter used throughout the application for parsing and formatting showtime values in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format.
getDuration() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the runtime of this movie in minutes.
getEmail() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the email address associated with this account.
getGenre() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the genre of this movie.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUIController
Returns the current singleton controller instance.
getMovieId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the ID of the movie associated with this booking.
getMovieId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the unique identifier of this movie screening.
getMovies() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Returns the entire in-memory movie map.
getOccupiedSeat() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the set of seat IDs that have already been booked for this screening.
getPassword() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the password associated with this account.
getRating() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the age rating of this movie.
getSeatPrice() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the price per seat for this screening.
getShowtime() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the scheduled showtime of the booked movie session.
getShowTime() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the scheduled showtime of this screening.
getStage() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUIController
Returns the Stage of this screen.
getTitle() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the title of this movie.
getTotalPrice() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the total price charged for this booking.
getUser(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Retrieves the Credential for the given email address.
getUsername() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the display name of the user.

I

init() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main.KetchupMain
Initialize the database when users open this app for the first time
initialize() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.LoginUIController
Static factory — loads LoginUI.fxml into a new Stage and shows it.
initialize() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.RegisterUIController
Static factory — loads RegisterUI.fxml into a new Stage and shows it.
initialize(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUIController
Static factory — loads AdminMovieListUI.fxml, passes the admin username, loads all movies into the table, and shows the Stage.
initialize(String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUIController
Static factory — loads CustomerHomeUI.fxml, wires the username and email, loads both tables asynchronously, and shows the Stage.
initialize(String, String, Window) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieFormUIController
Static factory — loads AdminMovieFormUI.fxml into a new APPLICATION_MODAL Stage and blocks until the dialog is closed.
initialize(String, String, Window) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerSeatSelectionUIController
Static factory — loads CustomerSeatSelectionUI.fxml, sets runtime state, builds the seat grid, and shows the Stage as APPLICATION_MODAL.
initialize(String, HashSet<String>, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerBookingConfirmUIController
Static factory — loads CustomerBookingConfirmUI.fxml, populates the booking summary, and shows it as an APPLICATION_MODAL dialog.
initialize(String, Window) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerBookingDetailUIController
Static factory — loads CustomerBookingDetailUI.fxml, wires the booking data, builds the read-only seat grid, and shows the Stage as APPLICATION_MODAL.
initialize(String, Window) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerMovieDetailUIController
Static factory — loads CustomerMovieDetailUI.fxml, populates all detail fields, and shows the Stage as a non-modal window.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieFormUIController
Called automatically by the FXMLLoader after all @FXML fields are injected.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUIController
Called automatically by FXMLLoader after all @FXML fields are injected.

The main entry point of the Ketchup application.

L

loadBookingsForUser(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Loads all booking records for the given user from the database into the in-memory map.
loadCredentials() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Loads all rows from the users table into the in-memory map.
loadMovies() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Loads all rows from the movies table into the in-memory map, including the current occupied seats per movie derived from bookings and booking_seats.

Represents a single movie screening entry in the Ketchup application.

S

searchBooking(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Searches the in-memory booking store for records matching the given query.
searchMovie(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Searches the in-memory movie store for records matching the given query.
setProcessed(boolean) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Sets the processed flag for this booking, indicating whether it has been written to BOOKINGS.csv.
shutdown() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.database.DatabaseService
Stops the embedded MariaDB server cleanly.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main.KetchupMain
JavaFX application entry point.
startup(boolean) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.database.DatabaseService
Starts the embedded MariaDB server and, on first launch, runs the DDL and seed-data scripts via SchemaInitializer and DatasetSeeder.
stop() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main.KetchupMain

V
